gist.headline: Art in the terminal
gist.blurb: Meet Frieze, a delightfully silly shell tool that generates AI-powered banner images and slogans right in your terminal. Because your command line was looking a little too serious.
gist.summary: Added Frieze, a community-built shell tool for generating AI banners and slogans, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover Frieze in the greenhouse and use it to inject AI-generated art into their terminal sessions.
gist.visual_concept: A retro terminal displaying a colorful banner. Polly the bee wearing a tiny artist beret, admiring the terminal. The Monitor Robot displaying a banner on its screen head. Represents the 'Frieze' CLI tool bringing art to the shell.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny artist beret, admiring a retro computer terminal that displays a colorful pixelated banner. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen glowing with a mini artwork. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
